top_categories.workout_context: When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive)'s demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive)'s mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 44 miles.
At Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive), surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
59ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Varied gradients on mixed terrain demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive). Train it until it feels boring.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive), that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
44 miles on mixed terrain burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Torque for headwinds and mixed terrain. When cadence drops below 70rpm, muscular strength keeps the watts up.
Base fitness for Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive). Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive)’s 44 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive). Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Bealach Mór (The Bà Sportive) requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 44 miles of mixed terrain in Shieldaig, Applecross Peninsula, Scottish Highlands, Scotland.
